templates.name: Infographic Template
templates.prompt:
Create a [INSERT OVERALL AESTHETIC: e.g., clean, fresh, and airy, minimalist, bold and energetic] Shopify product graphic on a [INSERT BACKGROUND DESCRIPTION: e.g., smooth gradient background transitioning from clean white at the top to a soft pale gold and light blue at the bottom, solid pastel pink background, textured concrete wall]. The aspect ratio is 1:1, resolution 2000x2000px. Use a [INSERT FONT FAMILY STYLE: e.g., modern clean sans-serif, classic serif, bold display] font family throughout. The layout must strictly follow this spatial arrangement:

Top Center (Headline Text):
[INSERT TEXT ALIGNMENT: e.g., Center-aligned, Left-aligned] headline text.
Line 1: "[INSERT HEADLINE TEXT: e.g., INSTANTLY REFRESH & REVIVE]" - Font size: [INSERT FONT SIZE: e.g., extra-large], Color: [INSERT TEXT COLOR: e.g., gold, dark navy, white], weight: [INSERT FONT WEIGHT/STYLE: e.g., bold, all-caps].

Center (Main Product & Dynamic Element):
A high-resolution, highly photorealistic photo of the user-uploaded product [INSERT PRODUCT DESCRIPTION: e.g., Pantene Dry Shampoo Foam bottle, matte black supplement jar, glass beverage bottle], positioned perfectly in the center. The product is floating and shot from a pronounced worm's-eye view, tilted slightly backward so the bottom curve of the cylinder is clearly visible, dramatic, heroic 3D perspective. Interacting dynamically with the product is a [INSERT DYNAMIC ELEMENT/PROP: e.g., cloud of soft billowy white foam swirling around the base, splash of water, scattering of ingredients, or "none"]. The product features [INSERT SPECIFIC PRODUCT DETAILS TO HIGHLIGHT: e.g., realistic foam texture and gold accents catching the light, condensation droplets on the surface, metallic sheen].

Left Side (Benefit Column 1):
Three vertically stacked benefit callouts, strictly positioned to the left of the central product. Each callout consists of an icon and text below it.

Top Left: A crisp, minimalist line-art icon representing [INSERT ICON CONCEPT: e.g., time/clock with an arrow, hydration droplet] enclosed in a thin circular border. Below it, [INSERT TEXT ALIGNMENT: e.g., center-aligned] text: "[INSERT BENEFIT TEXT: e.g., Instantly refreshes hair*]" - Font size: [INSERT FONT SIZE: e.g., medium], Color: [INSERT TEXT COLOR: e.g., blue, dark gray], weight: [INSERT FONT WEIGHT: e.g., standard, bold].
Middle Left: A line-art icon representing [INSERT ICON CONCEPT: e.g., hair volume/upward arrows, brightening sparkle] in a circular border. Below it, text: "[INSERT BENEFIT TEXT: e.g., Adds weightless volume*]" - Font size: [INSERT FONT SIZE: e.g., medium], Color: [INSERT TEXT COLOR: e.g., blue, dark gray].
Bottom Left: A line-art icon representing [INSERT ICON CONCEPT: e.g., oil absorption/droplet with an 'X', pore clearing] in a circular border. Below it, text: "[INSERT BENEFIT TEXT: e.g., Absorbs excess oil*]" - Font size: [INSERT FONT SIZE: e.g., medium], Color: [INSERT TEXT COLOR: e.g., blue, dark gray].

Right Side (Benefit Column 2):
Three vertically stacked benefit callouts, strictly positioned to the right of the central product, mirroring the vertical alignment of the left side.

Top Right: A line-art icon representing [INSERT ICON CONCEPT: e.g., no residue/clean surface, smoothing effect] in a circular border. Below it, text: "[INSERT BENEFIT TEXT: e.g., Leaves no residue*]" - Font size: [INSERT FONT SIZE: e.g., medium], Color: [INSERT TEXT COLOR: e.g., blue, dark gray].
Middle Right: A line-art icon representing [INSERT ICON CONCEPT: e.g., scent/fragrance wave, calming] in a circular border. Below it, text: "[INSERT BENEFIT TEXT: e.g., Clean, fresh scent*]" - Font size: [INSERT FONT SIZE: e.g., medium], Color: [INSERT TEXT COLOR: e.g., blue, dark gray].
Bottom Right: A line-art icon representing [INSERT ICON CONCEPT: e.g., color safety/hair strand with shield, barrier protection] in a circular border. Below it, text: "[INSERT BENEFIT TEXT: e.g., Safe for color-treated hair*]" - Font size: [INSERT FONT SIZE: e.g., medium], Color: [INSERT TEXT COLOR: e.g., blue, dark gray].

Bottom-Left Corner (Disclaimer Text):
A localized block of [INSERT TEXT ALIGNMENT: e.g., left-aligned] fine print text.
Text: "[INSERT DISCLAIMER TEXT: e.g., *Based on consumer perception studies. Results may vary.]" - Font size: [INSERT FONT SIZE: e.g., extra-small], Color: [INSERT TEXT COLOR: e.g., light gray], weight: [INSERT FONT WEIGHT: e.g., light].

Lighting & Rendering:
[INSERT LIGHTING STYLE: e.g., Soft diffused studio lighting with warm highlights, sharp high-contrast lighting] to create [INSERT LIGHTING EFFECT/GOAL: e.g., gentle shadows and emphasize the airy texture of the foam, defined edges and glossy reflections]. The image must be rendered with highly photorealistic quality as if captured by a professional DSLR camera with an [INSERT LENS TYPE: e.g., 85mm lens, macro lens], ensuring the depth of field keeps the center product sharply in focus while all text and thin line-art icons remain incredibly crisp and highly legible. The overall feel must be [INSERT FINAL MOOD/IMPRESSION: e.g., light clean premium and refreshing, moody and luxurious, vibrant and energetic].

templates.description: Two-panel split ad contrasting verbose millennial-style copy against minimal Gen Z emoji language for the same product — a viral social engagement format seen across Starbucks, Edgars Fashion, and Comfycup. Keep Millennial copy to 2–3 short sentences; long compound sentences trigger Gemini mid-text hallucinations in split layouts.
templates.prompt:
Create a square 1:1 (or 4:5 portrait) ad creative using the "Millennial [Team Role] vs Gen Z [Team Role]" split-panel format.

LAYOUT:
Two equal vertical panels side by side, filling the full frame. A single thin vertical line (1–2px, light grey ~#CCCCCC) runs the full height as the divider — no gap, no shade difference between panels. All text is centre-aligned within its panel. The composition is symmetrical.

BACKGROUND:
Pure white (#FFFFFF) on both panels. No gradients, no tinting, no texture. The background never changes — all contrast comes from the copy.

HEADERS (top of each panel, plain text — NO pill or badge shapes):
Left panel header — two lines:
  Line 1: [INSERT GENERATION LABEL] — e.g. "Millennial" or "MILLENNIAL" — large, ultra-bold (heavy weight) sans-serif, dark colour, centre-aligned
  Line 2: [INSERT TEAM ROLE] — e.g. "PR Team" or "Marketing Team" — same typeface, smaller size, lighter weight than line 1
Right panel header — same structure:
  Line 1: [INSERT GENERATION LABEL] — e.g. "Gen Z" or "GEN Z"
  Line 2: [INSERT TEAM ROLE] — e.g. "Social Team"
The team role label is part of the joke mechanic ("Millennial PR Team" vs "Gen Z Social Team") — include it always.

PRODUCT:
The exact same product shown in both panels, identically cropped, scaled, and positioned. Clean studio cutout on white, no lifestyle background. Subtle drop shadow beneath the product is common. Product can sit in the upper half (with copy below) or lower half (with copy above) — pick one and apply consistently to both panels.

COPY BLOCKS (above or below the product, centre-aligned in each panel):
Left panel — verbose/formal side:
  [INSERT VERBOSE COPY] — 3–5 lines of formal, benefit-driven, adjective-heavy marketing language. Examples: "crafted with our signature Blonde Espresso, shaken 10 times to deliver the light, frothy, and elevated mouthfeel"; "featuring an asymmetrical zip, silver hardware, and belted waist, it brings timeless moto style that elevates any look with effortless cool." Regular weight, smaller body font size.
Right panel — Gen Z side:
  [INSERT GEN Z COPY] — 1–2 lines maximum. Conversational, often lowercase or sentence case, genuine/unpolished tone. Usually one emoji at the end OR a self-referential joke. Examples: "wait why does this go with everything 🥺"; "\"baddies drink iced shaken espresso\""; "Nothing. We're a team of two millenials."
  FLOATING EMOJIS (optional but common): 4–6 emoji scattered loosely around the product in the Gen Z panel at random angles — not in a grid, not inline. Choose emojis relevant to the product vibe (e.g. 💋🖤😤 for fashion; ⭐🧊🤌 for food/drink).

BRAND ELEMENTS:
Option A — Logo bar: brand logo centred at the very bottom spanning full width, below both panels.
Option B — Brand colour: use the brand's primary colour for all text instead of black (e.g. dark forest green for Starbucks). This replaces a logo bar and keeps the design minimal.
No decorative shapes, borders, or heavy graphic elements anywhere.

COLOUR PALETTE:
- Background: #FFFFFF (always)
- Text: #1A1A1A near-black, OR brand primary colour if using Option B
- Divider line: ~#CCCCCC
- No accent colour — palette is intentionally minimal

STYLE NOTES:
Clean, contemporary, deliberately self-aware. The humour is entirely in the copy contrast — the design must stay neutral and restrained so the copy lands. Product imagery must be identical between panels. Gen Z floating emojis (when used) should look spontaneous, not arranged. This format is engineered to drive "which team are you?" comment engagement.

Output: single square 1:1 image, 1440×1440px or portrait 1080×1350px, photorealistic studio quality.

templates.name: Product vs Generic Split Comparison
templates.description: Vertical split: branded product on brand-colour left with 4 benefit callouts vs. generic competitor on kraft-tan right with 4 drawback callouts — thin curved arrows point toward each product.
templates.prompt:
A 2000x2000px square product comparison advertisement with generous margins. The canvas has 8% blank white padding on all four sides — no content touches the edges.

The inner area (inside the margins) is split cleanly in half by a hard vertical edge at exactly 50% width — no border, line, or shadow at the seam.

LEFT HALF (x: 0–50% of inner area): Background colour [LEFT_BG]. Soft photographic cloud texture visible in the lower-left quadrant.

RIGHT HALF (x: 50–100% of inner area): Background colour [RIGHT_BG]. Clean, plain, slightly matte.

Margins outside the inner area: white (#FFFFFF).

PRODUCTS — CRITICAL:
A single composite product sits centred at the seam. The vertical split line cuts directly through the middle of this composite, so the left half of the product sits in the left panel and the right half sits in the right panel. The combined product width is approximately 35–40% of the total canvas width (compact — not dominant). The product height is no more than 50% of the canvas height.

Left half of the composite: the branded [INSERT BRAND NAME] product ([INSERT PRODUCT NAME]) — rich label, premium appearance, warm amber honey visible, soft studio lighting with gentle drop shadow.
Right half of the composite: a generic supermarket honey jar — [INSERT COMPETITOR_DESC] — plain white label, unremarkable, flat lighting.

The seam runs right down the middle of this paired product — the left half background is [LEFT_BG] and the right half background is [RIGHT_BG], cutting cleanly between the two halves.

TEXT CALLOUTS — all in [TEXT_CLR], clean light-weight sans-serif (~20–22px equivalent), centre-aligned within compact text blocks. Text is annotation-sized, sitting well clear of the product in the open space on each side:

Left panel callouts (benefits of the branded product):
1. Top-left (~13% from left edge, 11% from top): "[INSERT BENEFIT_ONE]" — 1–2 lines. Thin curved arrow in [TEXT_CLR] curves down-right toward the left half of the product.
2. Far left middle (~7% from left, 39% from top): "[INSERT BENEFIT_TWO]" — 1–2 lines. Thin curved arrow curves right toward the left half of the product.
3. Left lower-centre (~7% from left, 57% from top): "[INSERT BENEFIT_THREE]" — 1 line. Thin curved arrow curves right toward the left half of the product.
4. Bottom-left (~11% from left, 77% from top): "[INSERT BENEFIT_FOUR]" — 1–2 lines. Thin curved arrow curves up-right toward the left half of the product.

Right panel callouts (drawbacks of the competitor product):
1. Upper-right (~59% from left, 11% from top): "[INSERT DRAWBACK_ONE]" — 1–2 lines. Thin curved arrow in [TEXT_CLR] curves down-left toward the right half of the product.
2. Far right middle (~77% from left, 39% from top): "[INSERT DRAWBACK_TWO]" — 1–2 lines. Thin curved arrow curves left toward the right half of the product.
3. Right lower-centre (~79% from left, 57% from top): "[INSERT DRAWBACK_THREE]" — 1 line. Thin curved arrow curves left toward the right half of the product.
4. Bottom-right (~61% from left, 77% from top): "[INSERT DRAWBACK_FOUR]" — 1–2 lines. Thin curved arrow curves up-left toward the right half of the product.

All arrows: thin strokes (~1.5px), [TEXT_CLR], small filled arrowhead at the product end, smooth organic curve. No logo, no headlines, no badges, no borders.

Output: 2000x2000px, 1:1 square, RGB, photorealistic, legible at 1080x1080px Instagram crop.

templates.name: Filling Up My Tank
templates.description: Relatable before/after social ad using a car fuel gauge metaphor — empty product left, fuel gauge centre, full product right, casual first-person caption headline at top and brand logo at bottom.
templates.prompt:
A 1080x1350px portrait-format social media ad for [INSERT BRAND NAME] on a clean white background (#FFFFFF) with a very subtle warm [INSERT TINT HEX e.g. #FFF3E0] gradient tint building toward the bottom quarter of the canvas. Minimal, clean, lots of white space.

TOP SECTION (top 28% of canvas height): Centred horizontally, vertically centred in that zone, is a two-line headline in [INSERT TEXT COLOR HEX e.g. #2C3E50]: '[INSERT HEADLINE e.g. Me filling up my tank:]' — clean geometric sans-serif font, bold weight (~700), approximately 52px equivalent, natural line break for rhythm, centred text alignment. Casual and relatable.

MIDDLE SECTION (28%–80% of canvas): Three elements arranged horizontally:

LEFT element (at ~20% from left edge, vertically centred in zone): A photorealistic product shot of [INSERT PRODUCT NAME] appearing NEAR-EMPTY — the product container is almost empty with just a thin layer of product remaining at the bottom. Label is visible but faded or partially peeled, suggesting the product is used up and depleted. No lid needed. Width approximately 28% of canvas. Minimal soft neutral shadow at base.

CENTRE element (exactly 50% horizontal, ~52% vertical of full canvas): A simple flat line-art illustration of a car dashboard fuel gauge — semicircular dial with the letter 'E' at the left tip and 'F' at the right tip, a small fuel pump icon in the centre-bottom of the arc, and a needle pointing clearly toward the right/F side indicating a full tank. Rendered in [INSERT TEXT COLOR HEX], clean minimal strokes, transparent background. Width ~16% of canvas.

RIGHT element (at ~80% from left edge, slightly higher at ~48% vertical): A photorealistic product shot of [INSERT PRODUCT NAME] appearing COMPLETELY FULL — vibrant and prominent. [INSERT FULL PRODUCT LABEL DESCRIPTION e.g. The jar has a black lid. The label is crimson red with gold botanical decorations, brand name at top, product name in script, size and MGO badge.] Width approximately 32% of canvas. Warm soft shadow at base.

BOTTOM SECTION (80%–100% of canvas): Clean white background. Centred horizontally and vertically: the brand logo/wordmark for [INSERT BRAND NAME] in [INSERT TEXT COLOR HEX], approximately 35% of canvas width. If a logo image is provided as a second input, reproduce it faithfully. Otherwise render the brand name in a clean serif font.

Overall mood: clean, minimal, playful, relatable. Plenty of white breathing room. No decorative borders, no extra graphic elements. Output: 1080x1350px, 4:5 ratio, RGB, photorealistic product photography with clean flat illustration accent for the fuel gauge.
